candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label at the top of the income statement.
Also a direct revenue label, but appears duplicative of Revenue in the preview.

variables.notes: Selected direct revenue labels as priority list; later code should use the first non-missing value. Both appear identical in the preview, with Revenue preferred.

candidates.why: Best match for direct service/production fulfillment costs on this statement.
Broad overhead bucket excluding COGS and D&A; appears to capture non-personnel overhead.
Explicit SG&A label, but appears to be a subcomponent of Other operating expenses in the current year rather than a standalone full-series line.

variables.notes: Chose overhead components and avoided likely double counting. In the current year, Selling, General & Administrative Expenses appears to roll into Other operating expenses alongside Other Operating Expense, so selecting the broader Other operating expenses plus Personnel Expenses gives overhead coverage without duplicating SG&A.

candidates.why: This is a balance sheet asset, not an income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line appears on the income statement. Balance-sheet R&D Technology - Net is not an expense row, so XRD is left empty.

candidates.why: Recurring finance cost line; acceptable when capturing financing costs beyond explicit interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Granular interest component, but it appears to be included within Other interest expenses via the balancing structure, so selecting both would risk double counting.

variables.notes: Selected recurring finance cost rows while avoiding double counting lease interest that appears embedded in Other interest expenses.

candidates.why: Best single equity line available; no owner/parent-only equity line is shown.
Also an equity total and appears identical to Total Equity in the preview; useful as fallback priority.

variables.notes: No separate parent-equity or non-controlling-interest line is visible, so Total Equity is used as BE and MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not a balance sheet non-controlling interest line; not suitable for MIB.

variables.notes: No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet.
